institutional_summary: There are no recent 13D/13G activist filings, but unusual options activity indicates strong institutional interest in NVDA, AAPL, AMZN, and MSFT. Analyst ratings corroborate this bullish sentiment, with all four stocks showing high confidence levels. Additionally, convergence signals are absent, but the overall institutional interest remains strong across these tickers.
